task_completion.description: Open the docker-compose.yml file in a text editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or IDE is open showing the contents of /home/ga/projects/shadow-bug/docker-compose.yml.

task_completion.description: Modify docker-compose.yml to prevent the node_modules directory from being shadowed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The volumes section in docker-compose.yml includes an anonymous volume for node_modules (e.g., - /app/node_modules) alongside the existing bind mount.

task_completion.description: Start the Docker container successfully without crashing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal shows the execution of 'docker compose up' or 'docker-compose up' in the project directory, and the logs indicate the server started successfully without the 'Cannot find module express' error.
A web browser navigated to http://localhost:3000 or a terminal showing a 'curl http://localhost:3000' command.

task_completion.description: Verify the application returns the expected success message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Hello from Docker!' is visible in the web browser viewport or as the output of the curl command in the terminal.

integrity.description: Ensure npm install was not run on the host machine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal history should not show 'npm install' being executed directly on the host. Additionally, the host's file explorer/tree in the IDE should not show a 'node_modules' folder inside /home/ga/projects/shadow-bug/.

integrity.description: Ensure the original .:/app bind mount was not removed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The docker-compose.yml file must still contain the '.:/app' (or equivalent) bind mount in its volumes list. The fix must be an addition, not a replacement.

integrity.description: Ensure the success message comes from a real HTTP request.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Hello from Docker!' string must appear as a network response in a browser or curl output, not merely echoed in the terminal or written in a text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is /home/ga/projects/shadow-bug. The container name is 'shadow-app'. The application must respond at http://localhost:3000 with the exact string 'Hello from Docker!'. The fix requires adding an anonymous volume for /app/node_modules in docker-compose.yml while keeping the .:/app bind mount.
